news.title:
Jindal Steel & Power saw an NSE block trade worth Rs. 23.5 Cr.
The trade involved 204,737 shares at Rs. 1,146.5 per share.

news.title:
BEL signed an MoU with RRP Group to boost defence tech; United Spirits sold RCSPL stake for ₹16,660 crore.
Tata Steel invested $180M in T Steel; Jindal Steel's BOF-3 raised crude steel capacity to 12 MTPA.
news.summary:
BEL signed an MoU with RRP Group to boost defence tech; United Spirits sold RCSPL stake for ₹16,660 crore.
Tata Steel invested $180M in T Steel; Jindal Steel's BOF-3 raised crude steel capacity to 12 MTPA.

news.title: Jindal Steel completes 6 mtpa expansion at Angul, raising capacity to 12 mtpa.
news.summary: Jindal Steel completes 6 mtpa expansion at Angul, raising capacity to 12 mtpa.

news.title:
JSPL warns delays in mine clearances may hinder India's 400 MT steel target by 2030.
Prolonged statutory clearance processes and mineral block issues are key challenges.
news.summary:
JSPL warns delays in mine clearances may hinder India's 400 MT steel target by 2030.
Prolonged statutory clearance processes and mineral block issues are key challenges.

news.title:
Jindal Steel named preferred bidder for 2 Odisha iron ore blocks, spanning 84 hectares with 38M tonnes.
Company committed 111.2% premium; blocks auctioned by Odisha Directorate of Mines in Dec 2025.
news.summary:

news.title:

This acquisition aims to strengthen resources and boost production.

news.title:
Nifty Metal index gained 7.6% in February; Tata Steel, Adani Ent., Jindal Steel, Lloyds advanced 10-13%.
Brokerages favor JSW Steel, Vedanta, Lloyds with strong demand, price hikes, and growth prospects driving optimism.
news.summary:
Nifty Metal index gained 7.6% in February; Tata Steel, Adani Ent., Jindal Steel, Lloyds advanced 10-13%.

news.title:
Skyhigh Sustainable acquired 4.97 cr shares (4.87%) of Jindal Steel Ltd from Gagan Infraenergy Ltd.
Acquisition was an off-market transfer under SEBI regulations, maintaining total voting capital unchanged.
news.summary:
Skyhigh Sustainable acquired 4.97 cr shares (4.87%) of Jindal Steel Ltd from Gagan Infraenergy Ltd.
Acquisition was an off-market transfer under SEBI regulations, maintaining total voting capital unchanged.

news.title:
Skyhigh Sustainable Ltd plans to acquire 4.87% of Jindal Steel Ltd shares via off-market transfer.
Acquisition aims to consolidate Jindal Steel Ltd's shareholding within the promoter group entities.
news.summary:
Skyhigh Sustainable Ltd plans to acquire 4.87% of Jindal Steel Ltd shares via off-market transfer.
Acquisition aims to consolidate Jindal Steel Ltd's shareholding within the promoter group entities.

news.title:
EU steel tariffs improve Thyssenkrupp's outlook amid Jindal stake sale talks.

news.summary:

news.title:
Jindal Steel shifts focus to flat products, targeting 55% flat and 45% long ratio by Q4 FY26.
The company aims for 70% value-added product profile as capacities expand.

news.title:
Jindal Steel plans to commission Basic Oxygen Furnace-III at Angul by Q4 FY26, boosting production capacity to 15.6 MT.
Slurry pipeline completion by FY26 end may save ₹750-850/tonne in costs.
news.summary:
Jindal Steel plans to commission Basic Oxygen Furnace-III at Angul by Q4 FY26, boosting production capacity to 15.6 MT.
Slurry pipeline completion by FY26 end may save ₹750-850/tonne in costs.

news.title:
Jindal Steel forecasts coking coal costs to rise by $18-$20/tonne in Q4 FY26.
Domestic steel prices increased by INR 3,000-3,500/tonne since Dec 2025; strong demand expected to sustain.
news.summary:

news.title:

news.title:
Nomura maintains 'Buy' on Tata Steel, JSW Steel, Jindal Steel citing strong domestic price momentum despite global challenges.
HRC prices rose 11% QoQ to Rs 52,400/tonne due to safeguard duties, cost pressures, and improved market sentiment.
